windows_adaptations: Put Git for Windows usr/bin on PATH because rapids-build-backend 0.4.1 invokes the Unix which command.

Replace deprecated assignment to ndarray.shape in cucim.skimage._vendored.pad with reshape for strict NumPy 2.5 compatibility.
